    <text style="font-family:"WHCWDU+MyriadPro-Regular" !important;font-size:50px !important;fill:#000000;opacity:1;dominant-baseline:text-before-edge;font-weight:normal;font-style:normal;"><tspan id="p16_z5" class="smil-target"><tspan x="132.62" y="1021.25" textLength="560.10" lengthAdjust="spacingAndGlyphs"><tspan style="fill:#000000;font-weight:normal;font-style:normal;">A horse has only one toe</tspan></tspan><tspan x="132.62" y="1087.90" textLength="291.90" lengthAdjust="spacingAndGlyphs"><tspan style="fill:#000000;font-weight:normal;font-style:normal;">on each foot.</tspan></tspan></tspan></text>
